DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-02-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
William S. Weisberg, Esq. of Weisberg Miller, (415-296-7070), for Brent Kristen Defendant and moving party.
Thomas E. Foran, Esq., Attorney at Law, (415-775-0891), for Robert V. Giusti, Plaintiff and opposing party.

Hearing is held. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows: DEFENDANT BRENT KIRSTEN DEMURRER'S TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained without leave to amend. Prevailing party to prepare order approved as to form. Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-10-2014 Continued To Apr-30-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-15-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No Appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT BRENT KIRSTEN DEMURRER's TO COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED in part and overruled in part. Demurer to complaint based on misjoinder is OVERRULED. Complaint alleges that in addition to being sued as individual, Kirsten is being sued as "doing business as" Digital Core Production Group, Inc. entity unknown. This allegation must be take as true on demurer. Demurer is sustained as to the 1st cause of action for rescission with leave to amend to attach an executed contract, if any. Demurer is sustained as to the 3rd cause of action for violation of B&P 17200 to allege all element of this cause of action. Demurrer is overruled as to the 2nd cause of action for fraud. Complaint sufficiently alleges all elements of fraud as Kirsten, individually and dba. Moving party to prepare order. Plaintiff shall have 10 days from notice of entry of order to file an amended complaint. Moving party and its counsel is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6C in future. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk J. Rumsey, Not Reported. (501)
